attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SCWDD.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID,
SCWDD.SOURCE_CODE,
SCWDD.SOURCE_LINE_ID,
SCWDD.SOURCE_HEADER_ID,
SCWDD.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
SCWDD.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
SCWDD.SHIP_SET_ID,
SCWDD.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,
SCWDD.MOVE_ORDER_LINE_ID,
SCWDD.SUBINVENTORY,
SCWDD.RELEASED_STATUS,
SCWDD.DATE_REQUESTED,
SCWDD.DATE_SCHEDULED,
SCWDD.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,
SCWDD.FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,
SCWDD.TRACKING_NUMBER,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE1,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE2,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE3,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE6,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE7,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE8,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE9,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE11,
SCWDD.GROSS_WEIGHT,
SCWDD.CONTAINER_NAME,
SCWDD.PICKED_QUANTITY,
SCWDD.GLOBAL_NAME,
SCWDD.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
SCWDD.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
SCWDD.REFRESH_DATETIME,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT 
SUBSTR(SUBSTR(SCW.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,INDEX(SCW.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,'_')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(SCW.SHIP_METHOD_CODE)),0,
		INDEX(SUBSTR(SCW.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,INDEX(SCW.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,'_')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(SCW.SHIP_METHOD_CODE)),'_')) SHIP_METHOD_CD
, SCW.*
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS SCW 
WHERE SOURCE_CODE='WSH'
) SCWDD
WHERE 
(
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
						WHERE SCWDD.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )
OR 
NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM(
			SEL   ECWDD1.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
			FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS  ECWDD1 
			INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM ECWDA
				ON ECWDD1.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID=ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
			INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS ECWDD  
			    ON ECWDA.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID = ECWDD.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID 
			 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT
				ON  ECWDD.SOURCE_LINE_ID =ELT.LINE_ID 			
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT1
				ON  COALESCE(ELT.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID, ELT.LINE_ID) = ELT1.LINE_ID			
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSCC
				ON ( NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = (  CASE WHEN ELT1.CMS_SOURCE_CODE = 'SJOE.CISCO.COM' THEN  'QTC' 
				WHEN  ELT1.CMS_SOURCE_CODE= 'BV.CISCO.COM' THEN  'BV'    ELSE  'CG'  END ))
			INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
				ON NSOLV.SS_CODE   =NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
				AND NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = COALESCE(ELT1.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID,ELT1.LINE_ID)
			QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID  ORDER BY ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID  DESC) = 1
			 )SOL1
			WHERE SCWDD.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID=SOL1.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
) 
OR 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM(
		SEL SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY ,ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
		FROM
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM ECWDA
		INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL SSSD  
		                ON ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID = SSSD.SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT 
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID  
		ORDER BY ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID  DESC) = 1
		                 )PSOL
		WHERE  PSOL.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID=SCWDD.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
)
OR 
NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES ECWND ,
               $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM ECWDA
		WHERE  ECWND.DELIVERY_ID=ECWDA.DELIVERY_ID
		AND ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID =SCWDD.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
)
OR 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FREIGHT_CARRIER NFC
		WHERE  NFC.BK_CARRIER_ID =SCWDD.SHIP_METHOD_CD
		)
)
UNION ALL
SELECT 
SCWDD.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID,
SCWDD.SOURCE_CODE,
SCWDD.SOURCE_LINE_ID,
SCWDD.SOURCE_HEADER_ID,
SCWDD.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
SCWDD.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
SCWDD.SHIP_SET_ID,
SCWDD.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,
SCWDD.MOVE_ORDER_LINE_ID,
SCWDD.SUBINVENTORY,
SCWDD.RELEASED_STATUS,
SCWDD.DATE_REQUESTED,
SCWDD.DATE_SCHEDULED,
SCWDD.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,
SCWDD.FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,
SCWDD.TRACKING_NUMBER,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE1,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE2,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE3,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE6,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE7,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE8,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE9,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE11,
SCWDD.GROSS_WEIGHT,
SCWDD.CONTAINER_NAME,
SCWDD.PICKED_QUANTITY,
SCWDD.GLOBAL_NAME,
SCWDD.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
SCWDD.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
SCWDD.REFRESH_DATETIME,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT 
SUBSTR(SUBSTR(SCW.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,INDEX(SCW.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,'_')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(SCW.SHIP_METHOD_CODE)),0,
		INDEX(SUBSTR(SCW.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,INDEX(SCW.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,'_')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(SCW.SHIP_METHOD_CODE)),'_')) SHIP_METHOD_CD
, SCW.*
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS SCW 
 WHERE SOURCE_CODE='OE'
) SCWDD
WHERE  
(
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE SCWDD.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )
OR  
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (
			SELECT  ELT1.LINE_ID
			FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT1
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT2
			ON  COALESCE(ELT1.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID, ELT1.LINE_ID) = ELT2.LINE_ID
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSCC
			ON ( NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = (  CASE WHEN ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE = 'SJOE.CISCO.COM' THEN  'QTC' 
			WHEN  ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_CODE= 'BV.CISCO.COM' THEN  'BV'    ELSE  'CG'  END ))
			INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
			ON NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = COALESCE(ELT2.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID ,ELT2.LINE_ID)
			AND NSOLV.SS_CODE =  NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
			) SOL
			WHERE SOL.LINE_ID = SCWDD.SOURCE_LINE_ID 			
)
OR 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM(
			SEL SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY ,ECWDA.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
			FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM ECWDA
			INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL SSSD  
			    ON ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID = SSSD.SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT 
                 )PSOL
			WHERE  PSOL.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID=SCWDD.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
)
OR 
NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES ECWND ,
				$$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM ECWDA
				WHERE  ECWND.DELIVERY_ID=ECWDA.DELIVERY_ID
				AND SCWDD.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID=ECWDA.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
)
OR 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FREIGHT_CARRIER NFC
		WHERE  NFC.BK_CARRIER_ID = SCWDD.SHIP_METHOD_CD
)
OR 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MOVE_ORDER_LINE NMOL
			WHERE  NMOL.SK_LINE_ID_INT=SCWDD.MOVE_ORDER_LINE_ID)
)

SELECT  
RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SSD.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID,SSD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + MAX_VAL SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY,
SSD.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID AS SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT
FROM  
(
 SELECT COALESCE (MAX (SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL) SSDO,
(
SELECT SSSED.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM (
SELECT  CAST(COALESCE(LINE_ID,LINE_REF_NUMBER) AS BIGINT) AS DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID,'OPL' AS GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL GROUP BY 1,2 
UNION ALL 
SELECT DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID, GLOBAL_NAME
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS    
UNION ALL
SELECT DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID, GLOBAL_NAME
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS 
 ) SSSED
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON SSSED.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
) SSD
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL SSSD WHERE SSSD.SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT = SSD.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID)

SELECT
SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY,
PARENT_SOL_SHIPMENT_DLVRY_KEY,
INITIAL_PICKUP_DTM,
DV_INITIAL_PICKUP_DT,
SOURCE_CREATION_DTM,
PLANNED_ULTIMATE_DROPOFF_DTM,
DV_PLANNED_ULTIMATE_DROPOFF_DT,
DV_SOURCE_CREATION_DT,
ASN_STATUS_CD,
ASN_SENT_DTM,
DV_ASN_SENT_DT,
DELIVERY_STATUS_CD,
PLANNED_FLG,
PICKED_QTY,
FREIGHT_TERMS_CD,
SHIPPING_PRIORITY_CD,
SHIPPING_PREFERENCE_CD,
SHIPPING_MODE_CD,
REQUESTED_DTM,
DV_REQUESTED_DT,
RU_BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME,
RU_INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
SCHEDULED_DTM,
DV_SCHEDULED_DT,
COALESCE(DSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME ,'UNKNOWN') RU_DSTN_STRTG_LGSTCS_CNTR_NAME,
COALESCE(OSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME ,'UNKNOWN') RU_ORGN_STRTG_LGSTCS_CNTR_NAME,
PICK_RELEASE_STATUS_CD,
SUBINVENTORY_CD,
DELIVERY_TYPE_CD,
DELIVERY_TYPE,
SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
DELIVERY_NAME,
MOVE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
FRIEGHT_CAREER_ID,
RU_TRUCK_NUM,
RU_SHIPPED_QTY,
RU_TRACKING_NUM,
RU_GROSS_WEIGHT_AMT,
RU_DELIVERY_DTM,
RU_RECEIVE_AT_OSLC_DTM,
RU_DV_RECEIVE_AT_DSLC_DT,
RU_RECEIVE_AT_DSLC_DTM,
RU_DV_RECEIVE_AT_OSLC_DT,
RU_LPN_PARENT_FLG,
RU_LICENSE_PLATE_NUM,
RU_CONTAINER_NAME,
RU_CONFIRM_DTM,
RU_DV_CONFIRM_DT,
RU_RETURN_TO_VENDOR_REASON_CD,
SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DT,
DELIVERY_ID_INT,
ACTION_CODE,
DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT 
SSSD.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY AS SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY,
COALESCE (PSOL.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY,-999) AS PARENT_SOL_SHIPMENT_DLVRY_KEY ,
ECWND.INITIAL_PICKUP_DATE AS INITIAL_PICKUP_DTM,
CAST(ECWND.INITIAL_PICKUP_DATE AS DATE ) AS DV_INITIAL_PICKUP_DT,
ECWND.CREATION_DATE AS SOURCE_CREATION_DTM,
CAST (ECWND.ULTIMATE_DROPOFF_DATE AS DATE) AS PLANNED_ULTIMATE_DROPOFF_DTM,
ECWND.ULTIMATE_DROPOFF_DATE  AS DV_PLANNED_ULTIMATE_DROPOFF_DT,
CAST (ECWND.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_SOURCE_CREATION_DT,
COALESCE (ECWND.ASN_STATUS_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS ASN_STATUS_CD,
ECWND.ASN_DATE_SENT AS ASN_SENT_DTM,
CAST (ECWND.ASN_DATE_SENT AS DATE ) AS DV_ASN_SENT_DT,
COALESCE(ECWND.STATUS_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS DELIVERY_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(ECWND.PLANNED_FLAG,'N') AS PLANNED_FLG,
SSSED.PICKED_QUANTITY AS PICKED_QTY, 
COALESCE(SSSED.FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS FREIGHT_TERMS_CD,
COALESCE (ECWCS.SHIPPING_PRIORITY_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS SHIPPING_PRIORITY_CD,/* CODE CHANGED FOR SHIPPING PRIORITY CODE FROM SSSED TO ECWCS */
COALESCE (SSSED.SHIPPING_PREFERENCE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS SHIPPING_PREFERENCE_CD,
COALESCE(SSSED.SHIPPING_MODE_CODE,'U') AS SHIPPING_MODE_CD,
SSSED.DATE_REQUESTED AS REQUESTED_DTM ,
CAST(SSSED.DATE_REQUESTED AS DATE ) AS DV_REQUESTED_DT,
COALESCE(NSL.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME,
COALESCE(NSL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,-999) AS RU_INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
SSSED.DATE_SCHEDULED AS SCHEDULED_DTM,
CAST(SSSED.DATE_SCHEDULED AS DATE)  AS DV_SCHEDULED_DT,


COALESCE(
CASE WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'CDC%'  and attribute3 not like 'SLC%' THEN 
SUBSTR(SUBSTR(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,INDEX(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,'-')+1,
CHARACTER_LENGTH(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE)),INDEX(SUBSTR(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,INDEX(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,'-')+1,
CHARACTER_LENGTH(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE)),'-')+1)
WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'CDC%'  and attribute3 like 'SLC%' THEN SSSED.attribute3
WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'CODC%'   THen  
SUBSTR(SUBSTR(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE
,INDEX(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,'-')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE)),INDEX(SUBSTR(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE
,INDEX(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,'-')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE)),'-')+1)
WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'CC%'  THEN 
SUBSTR(SUBSTR(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,INDEX(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,'-')+1,
CHARACTER_LENGTH(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE)),INDEX(SUBSTR(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,INDEX(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,'-')+1,
CHARACTER_LENGTH(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE)),'-')+1)
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END
,'UNKNOWN') AS  RU_DSTN_STRTG_LGSTCS_CNTR_NAME,
coalesce(
CASE WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'COC%'   and attribute3 not like 'SLC%' THEN 
SUBSTR(SUBSTR(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,INDEX(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,'-')+1,
CHARACTER_LENGTH(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE)),INDEX(SUBSTR(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,INDEX(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,'-')+1,
CHARACTER_LENGTH(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE)),'-')+1)
WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'COC%'  and attribute3 like 'SLC%'  THEN SSSED.attribute3
WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'CODC%'  THEN  
SUBSTR(SUBSTR(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,INDEX(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,'-')+1,
CHARACTER_LENGTH(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE)),0,INDEX(SUBSTR(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE
,INDEX(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,'-')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE)),'-')) 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END,'UNKNOWN')  AS RU_ORGN_STRTG_LGSTCS_CNTR_NAME,
COALESCE(SSSED.RELEASED_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS PICK_RELEASE_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(SSSED.SUBINVENTORY,'UNKNOWN') AS SUBINVENTORY_CD,
SSSED.SOURCE_CODE AS DELIVERY_TYPE_CD,
'ACTUAL'   AS  DELIVERY_TYPE,
SSSED.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID AS SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT,
COALESCE (SOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777)  AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
COALESCE(ECWND.NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS DELIVERY_NAME,
CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS MOVE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(NFC.BK_CARRIER_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS FRIEGHT_CAREER_ID,
COALESCE(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE6,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_TRUCK_NUM,
SSSED.SHIPPED_QUANTITY AS RU_SHIPPED_QTY,
SSSED.TRACKING_NUMBER AS RU_TRACKING_NUM ,
SSSED.GROSS_WEIGHT AS RU_GROSS_WEIGHT_AMT,
ECWND.DELIVERED_DATE AS RU_DELIVERY_DTM,

CASE WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'COC%' AND CHARACTER_LENGTH(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE8)=19  THEN cast(SSSED.attribute8 as timestamp(0) format 'YYYY/MM/DDBHH:MI:SS') 
WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'COC%' AND CHARACTER_LENGTH(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE8)=9 THEN CAST(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE8 AS timestamp(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY')
WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'CODC%' AND CHARACTER_LENGTH(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE11)=19   THEN cast(SSSED.attribute11 as timestamp(0) format 'YYYY/MM/DDBHH:MI:SS')
WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'CODC%' AND CHARACTER_LENGTH(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE11)=9  THEN cast(SSSED.attribute11 as timestamp(0) format 'DD-MMM-YY')
END  AS  RU_RECEIVE_AT_OSLC_DTM ,

CAST(   CASE WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE LIKE ANY ('CDC%','CODC%') AND   CHARACTER_LENGTH(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE8)=19 THEN
CAST(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE8 AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'YYYY/MM/DDBHH:MI:SS')   
WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE LIKE ANY ('CDC%','CODC%') AND   CHARACTER_LENGTH(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE8)=9 THEN
CAST(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE8 AS timestamp(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY')  END  AS DATE) AS RU_DV_RECEIVE_AT_DSLC_DT,   

CASE WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like any ('CDC%','CODC%') AND   CHARACTER_LENGTH(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE8)=19 THEN   cast(SSSED.attribute8 as timestamp(0) format 'YYYY/MM/DDBHH:MI:SS')
WHEN   SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like any ('CDC%','CODC%') AND   CHARACTER_LENGTH(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE8)=9 THEN
CAST(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE8 AS timestamp(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY')  END  AS RU_RECEIVE_AT_DSLC_DTM,   

CAST(CASE WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'COC%' AND  CHARACTER_LENGTH(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE8)=19 THEN cast(SSSED.attribute8 as timestamp(0) format 'YYYY/MM/DDBHH:MI:SS') 
WHEN  SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'COC%' AND  CHARACTER_LENGTH(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE8)=9 THEN CAST (SSSED.attribute8 AS timestamp(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY')
WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'CODC%' AND CHARACTER_LENGTH(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE11)=19  THEN cast(SSSED.attribute11 as timestamp(0) format 'YYYY/MM/DDBHH:MI:SS' )
WHEN SOL1.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE like 'CODC%' AND CHARACTER_LENGTH(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE11)=9  THEN cast(SSSED.attribute11 as timestamp(0) format 'DD-MMM-YY') 
END AS DATE FORMAT'YYYY/MM/DD') AS RU_DV_RECEIVE_AT_OSLC_DT ,

COALESCE(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE1,'N') AS RU_LPN_PARENT_FLG,
COALESCE (SSSED.ATTRIBUTE2,'UNKNOWN')   AS RU_LICENSE_PLATE_NUM,  
COALESCE(SSSED.CONTAINER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_CONTAINER_NAME,
CAST(ECWND.CONFIRM_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_CONFIRM_DTM,
CAST (ECWND.CONFIRM_DATE AS DATE) AS RU_DV_CONFIRM_DT,
COALESCE(SSSED.ATTRIBUTE9,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_RETURN_TO_VENDOR_REASON_CD,
CAST(CAST(OTM.ATTRIBUTE7 AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'YYYYMMDDHHMISS') AS DATE)  AS SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DT,
ECWND.DELIVERY_ID AS DELIVERY_ID_INT,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NSSD.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT 
SSSED_PRE.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID,
SSSED_PRE.SOURCE_CODE,
SSSED_PRE.SOURCE_LINE_ID,
SSSED_PRE.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
SSSED_PRE.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
SSSED_PRE.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,
SSSED_PRE.SUBINVENTORY,
SSSED_PRE.MOVE_ORDER_LINE_ID,
SSSED_PRE.RELEASED_STATUS,
SSSED_PRE.DATE_REQUESTED,
SSSED_PRE.DATE_SCHEDULED,
SSSED_PRE.PICK_RELEASE_STATUS_CODE,
SSSED_PRE. SHIP_METHOD_CODE,
SSSED_PRE. SHIPPING_PREFERENCE_CODE,
--SUBSTR(SSSED_PRE.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,INDEX(SSSED_PRE.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,'_')+1,
 SSSED_PRE.FIELD2 ,
SSSED_PRE.CARRIER_CODE,
SSSED_PRE. FIELD3 ,
SSSED_PRE.SHIPPING_MODE_CODE,
SSSED_PRE.FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,
SSSED_PRE.TRACKING_NUMBER,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE1,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE2,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE3,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE6,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE7,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE8,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE9,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE11,
SSSED_PRE.GROSS_WEIGHT,
SSSED_PRE.CONTAINER_NAME,
SSSED_PRE.PICKED_QUANTITY,
SSSED_PRE.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
(
SELECT	
SCWDD.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID,
SCWDD.SOURCE_CODE,
SCWDD.SOURCE_LINE_ID,
SCWDD.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
SCWDD.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
SCWDD.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,
SCWDD.SUBINVENTORY,
SCWDD.MOVE_ORDER_LINE_ID,
SCWDD.RELEASED_STATUS,
SCWDD.DATE_REQUESTED,
SCWDD.DATE_SCHEDULED,
SCWDD.RELEASED_STATUS AS PICK_RELEASE_STATUS_CODE,
SCWDD.SHIP_METHOD_CODE AS SHIP_METHOD_CODE,
SUBSTR(SCWDD.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,0,INDEX(SCWDD.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,'_'))   AS SHIPPING_PREFERENCE_CODE,
SUBSTR(SCWDD.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,INDEX(SCWDD.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,'_')+1,		CHARACTER_LENGTH(SCWDD.SHIP_METHOD_CODE)) AS FIELD2 ,
SUBSTR(FIELD2,0,INDEX(FIELD2,'_')) AS CARRIER_CODE,
SUBSTR(FIELD2,INDEX(FIELD2,'_')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD2)) AS FIELD3 ,
SUBSTR(FIELD3,0,INDEX(FIELD3,'_')) AS SHIPPING_MODE_CODE,
SCWDD.FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,
SCWDD.TRACKING_NUMBER,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE1,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE2,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE3,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE6,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE7,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE8,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE9,
SCWDD.ATTRIBUTE11,
SCWDD.GROSS_WEIGHT,
SCWDD.CONTAINER_NAME,
SCWDD.PICKED_QUANTITY,
SCWDD.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM	
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS SCWDD
WHERE	1=2
) SSSED_PRE
GROUP BY 
SSSED_PRE.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID,
SSSED_PRE.SOURCE_CODE,
SSSED_PRE.SOURCE_LINE_ID,
SSSED_PRE.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
SSSED_PRE.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
SSSED_PRE.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,
SSSED_PRE.SUBINVENTORY,
SSSED_PRE.MOVE_ORDER_LINE_ID,
SSSED_PRE.RELEASED_STATUS,
SSSED_PRE.DATE_REQUESTED,
SSSED_PRE.DATE_SCHEDULED,
SSSED_PRE.PICK_RELEASE_STATUS_CODE,
SSSED_PRE. SHIP_METHOD_CODE,
SSSED_PRE. SHIPPING_PREFERENCE_CODE,
SSSED_PRE.FIELD2 ,
SSSED_PRE.CARRIER_CODE,
SSSED_PRE. FIELD3 ,
SSSED_PRE.SHIPPING_MODE_CODE,
SSSED_PRE.FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,
SSSED_PRE.TRACKING_NUMBER,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE1,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE2,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE3,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE6,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE7,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE8,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE9,
SSSED_PRE.ATTRIBUTE11,
SSSED_PRE.GROSS_WEIGHT,
SSSED_PRE.CONTAINER_NAME,
SSSED_PRE.PICKED_QUANTITY,
SSSED_PRE.GLOBAL_NAME
) SSSED 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON SSSED.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL SSSD            
ON SSSED.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID = SSSD.SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT 

LEFT JOIN
(
sel  ECWDD1.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID, NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,NSOLV.SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,
NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,ECWDD.SOURCE_LINE_ID
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS  ECWDD1 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM ECWDA
ON ECWDD1.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID=ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS ECWDD  
ON ECWDA.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID = ECWDD.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT
ON  ECWDD.SOURCE_LINE_ID =ELT.LINE_ID 			
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT1
ON  COALESCE(ELT.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID, ELT.LINE_ID) = ELT1.LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSCC
ON ( NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = (  CASE WHEN ELT1.CMS_SOURCE_CODE = 'SJOE.CISCO.COM' THEN  'QTC' 
				WHEN  ELT1.CMS_SOURCE_CODE= 'BV.CISCO.COM' THEN  'BV'    ELSE  'CG'  END ))
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL 
ON NSOL.SS_CODE   =NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
AND NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = COALESCE(ELT1.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID,ELT1.LINE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
ON NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID  ORDER BY ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID  DESC) = 1
)SOL1
ON SSSED.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID=SOL1.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
LEFT JOIN
(
sel SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY ,ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
from
$$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM ECWDA
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL SSSD  
ON ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID = SSSD.SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID  
ORDER BY ECWDA.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID  DESC) = 1
)PSOL
ON PSOL.PARENT_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID=SSSED.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM ECWDA
ON ECWDA.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID=SSSED.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES ECWND 
ON ECWND.DELIVERY_ID=ECWDA.DELIVERY_ID
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG ORG
ON ORG.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE=SOL1.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUBINVENTORY_LOCATION NSL
ON ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=nsl.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
AND SSSED.ATTRIBUTE7=NSL.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FREIGHT_CARRIER NFC
ON NFC.BK_CARRIER_ID =SSSED.CARRIER_CODE
LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT ECWCS.SHIP_METHOD_CODE,	ECWCS.SHIP_METHOD_MEANING AS SHIPPING_PRIORITY_CODE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_CARRIER_SERVICES ECWCS) ECWCS
ON ECWCS.SHIP_METHOD_CODE = SSSED.SHIP_METHOD_CODE  /* CODE ADDED FOR SHIPPING PRIORITY CODE*/
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT  OTM.ATTRIBUTE7,OTM_IB.DELIVERY_ID ,OTM.PLAN_SEQ_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_SHP_IB_IC   OTM 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXSCM_DV_OTM_DELV_IB_IC     OTM_IB 
ON  OTM_IB.PLAN_SEQ_ID =OTM.PLAN_SEQ_ID
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  OTM_IB.DELIVERY_ID  ORDER BY OTM.PLAN_SEQ_ID  DESC) = 1
)OTM
ON OTM.DELIVERY_ID=ECWND.DELIVERY_ID
LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL NSSD
ON SSSD.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY = NSSD.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY
)SOS
LEFT  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_STRATEGIC_LOGISTICS_CENTER DSLC
ON DSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME =SOS.RU_DSTN_STRTG_LGSTCS_CNTR_NAME
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_STRATEGIC_LOGISTICS_CENTER OSLC
ON OSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME=SOS.RU_ORGN_STRTG_LGSTCS_CNTR_NAME
